notes: Indirect calls through function pointer tables are a common source of incomplete or incorrect Ghidra decompilation.  The decompiler may show `(*pfn)(arg)` without resolving which function is called. This tests whether the analysis pipeline's agents can: (a) identify the dispatch table in .rdata (b) enumerate the concrete target functions (c) explain the state machine that sequences commands capa should flag "dispatch function by index" or similar behavioral rules.  The error-handling branches add realistic control-flow complexity that planners must decompose into work items. Autogenerated scaffold built from the source corpus and executable sample manifest. Reference anchors were hardened with concrete sample-specific observations for controlled evaluation.
